creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
Is it not a problem that a Java11 application would require Java8 components? I don't think users should have to have 2 JDKs installed. Unfortunately Filebot isn't open source and so we're left using whatever JAR the developer provides, which is built against  jdk11.

Leaving jna pinned to jdk8 by default seems okay, but I know it also builds on jdk11 just fine. Adding a jdk11 flavor would be nice-to-have to avoid dependency nightmares.
